institutionName: Mount Sinai Medical Center Miami Beach
unresolveds: Merged claim ledger is empty despite 69 candidate sources captured (multiple OBSERVERSHIP_PAGE, VISITING_STUDENT_PAGE, GME_PAGE, RESEARCH_PAGE, VOLUNTEER_PAGE, CAREERS_PAGE, FELLOWSHIP_PAGE, RESIDENCY_PAGE families). No quote-backed positive or negative claims emitted — likely under-extraction by A1/A2 reader rather than genuine absence.
verdictSummary: Empty merged claim ledger — zero claims of any visibility, so no public-safety risk to adjudicate. Ledger is internally consistent and safe to merge (nothing publishes). However, 69 candidate sources across all relevant families yielded zero claims, which is suspicious of under-extraction; flagged in unresolveds for operator review but does not block A3 PASS.
